_provenance: Claude-authored original passages (DeepSeek not used). Gaokao 语法填空 style: 10 blanks per passage testing tense/voice, non-finite verbs, relatives, articles, prepositions, comparatives, derivation, connectors.

sets.passage: Last summer, I had a chance (1)____ (learn) Chinese calligraphy in a small studio near my home. On the first day, my teacher, an elderly man (2)____ had practised the art for fifty years, showed me how to hold the brush. (3)____ (hold) the brush correctly was much harder than I had expected, and the lines I drew looked even (4)____ (bad) than a child's. However, my teacher was very (5)____ (patience). He told me that calligraphy was not only about beautiful characters (6)____ also about a calm mind. Every afternoon I practised for two hours, and gradually my strokes became (7)____ (steady) and more confident. By the end of August, I (8)____ (complete) my first real work, (9)____ single character meaning 'peace'. That experience taught me a valuable lesson: real skill grows slowly. Now, (10)____ I feel impatient, I think of the brush and breathe deeply.
sets.explain_zh: (1) chance to do 固定搭配；(2) 先行词 man 指人用 who/that；(3) 动名词作主语 Holding；(4) bad 比较级 worse；(5) patience→形容词 patient；(6) not only...but also；(7) steady 比较级 steadier；(8) by the end of August 过去叙述用过去完成 had completed；(9) single 前用不定冠词 a；(10) 时间状语从句 whenever。

sets.passage: The small village of Lijiawan sits beside a river (1)____ runs down from the green mountains. For hundreds of years, the villagers had to cross the water on an old wooden bridge, (2)____ (build) by their ancestors. Although it was narrow, the bridge connected them to the markets (3)____ the other side. In 2019, a heavy flood washed the bridge away, and the loss was (4)____ (true) a disaster for everyone. Without it, farmers found it (5)____ (possible) to sell their vegetables. Then something moving happened. Young people who had left for the cities decided (6)____ (return) home to help. Together with the older villagers, they spent three months (7)____ (rebuild) a stronger stone bridge. When it was finally finished, everyone gathered to celebrate (8)____ great joy. Today the new bridge stands (9)____ (proud) over the river, reminding the villagers that difficulties can be overcome (10)____ they work as one.
sets.explain_zh: (1) 先行词 river 指物用 which/that；(2) 过去分词作后置定语 built；(3) on the other side；(4) true→副词 truly；(5) found it impossible to do；(6) decide to do；(7) spend time doing；(8) with great joy；(9) stand + 副词 proudly；(10) 条件状语从句 if/as long as。
